items.title: The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
items.summary: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.

items.title: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
